# Zanna Result Runtime Reference

[Back to the runtime reference index](README.md)

## Classes

<a id="zanna-result"></a>
### `Zanna.Result`

Represents either a successful value or a structured runtime failure.

`Zanna.Result` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to construct
the class directly. Its public surface exposes properties such as `IsOk`, `IsErr` and
operations including `Ok`, `OkStr`, `OkI64`, `OkF64`.

#### Properties

| Property | Type | Access |
|---|---|---|
| <a id="zanna-result-isok"></a>`IsOk` | `i1` | read-only |
| <a id="zanna-result-iserr"></a>`IsErr` | `i1` | read-only |
